snippet.title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go | Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai |Varun,Mrunal,Pooja| In Cinemas 5th June
snippet.description:
🔥 Get ready to groove to the ultimate dance song of the year — Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go! 💃✨
From the much-awaited Bollywood entertainer Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai, this electrifying track brings back the iconic 90s vibe with a fresh party twist! 🎶❤️

With peppy beats, colorful energy, and vocals that will make you hit repeat, this song is all set to rule your playlists and dance floors! 🕺🔥

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Releasing In Cinemas Worldwide on 5th June 2026

Saari Raen Din
Saara Chaen Mera
Hosh Tabiyat Lutt Ke Lae Gayi,
 
Udti Jaaye Banke Patang,
Kar Mujhko Tang Ye Kya Hai Keh Gayi,
 
Lehraaye Besharmi Se
Tadpaaye Berehmi Se

snippet.title: HAMDAM (Official Music Video) - Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam, HarisSaleem, Zakariya
snippet.description:
“Between prayers and memories, there lives a Hamdam”.

Celebrate this Bakrid with "HAMDAM," a grand audio-visual anthem from Aachus Production that beautifully bridges traditional festive warmth with modern global sounds to deliver a powerful message of peace, love, and togetherness.

Composed and performed by Hesham Abdul Wahab, the track features the soulful vocals of Hanan Shaah, moving Malayalam lyrics by Shafi Kollam, and an energetic English rap verse by veteran artist Haris Saleem (Street Academics). Bringing this melody to life on screen is award-winning filmmaker Zakariya in his music video directorial debut, transforming "HAMDAM" into a stunning, cinematic celebration of community.

Listen to HAMDAM: https://tuneabl.com/stream-hamdam

localized.title: HAMDAM (Official Music Video) - Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam, HarisSaleem, Zakariya
localized.description:
“Between prayers and memories, there lives a Hamdam”.

Celebrate this Bakrid with "HAMDAM," a grand audio-visual anthem from Aachus Production that beautifully bridges traditional festive warmth with modern global sounds to deliver a powerful message of peace, love, and togetherness.

Composed and performed by Hesham Abdul Wahab, the track features the soulful vocals of Hanan Shaah, moving Malayalam lyrics by Shafi Kollam, and an energetic English rap verse by veteran artist Haris Saleem (Street Academics). Bringing this melody to life on screen is award-winning filmmaker Zakariya in his music video directorial debut, transforming "HAMDAM" into a stunning, cinematic celebration of community.

Listen to HAMDAM: https://tuneabl.com/stream-hamdam

LUCKY MANILA & KULDEEP RASILA PRESENTS

🎬 REAL STRUGGLE – Official Music Video


Life is not always easy. Behind every smile, every dream, and every success, there is a story of sacrifice, pain, hard work, and struggle. “REAL STRUGGLE” is a Punjabi track dedicated to those people who keep fighting their battles silently and never give up.
This song reflects the reality of life, emotions, and the journey that many people experience while chasing their dreams. If you have ever faced difficult times, this song is for you.

Set in Pre-liberalised India, TITAN is “India’s First Start-up story” where India was at the cusp of an economic & social change. The show follows the journey of Xerxes Desai, who was tasked with reviving Tata Press but he ends up transforming the failing venture by pivoting to a totally new category, watches. Facing bureaucratic hurdles, market challenges, and personal sacrifices, Xerxes’ relentless pursuit of excellence and innovation culminates in the birth of iconic brands like Sonata and the revolutionary Titan Edge, eventually leading to his name becoming the gold standard of Indian ingenuity & resilience.

snippet.title: श्री राम की गली में तुम जाना | Shri Ram Ki Gali Mein Tum Jana | Nachte Milenge Hanumana
snippet.description:
Shri Ram Ki Gali Mein Tum Jana Wahan Nachte Milenge Hanumana | Hanuman Bhajan for Energy, Bhakti & Positivity | Sanatan Music

“Shri Ram Ki Gali Mein Tum Jana Wahan Nachte Milenge Hanumana” is a joyful and powerful Hanuman bhajan filled with Ram bhakti, celebration, and devotional energy. This song beautifully shows the deep love of Hanuman ji for Shri Ram — where the name of Ram is sung, Hanuman is always present with devotion, strength, and divine joy.

This Hanuman bhajan is perfect for morning devotion, Tuesday/Saturday puja, Ram bhakti gatherings, satsang, festive playlists, workout motivation, or anytime you want to fill your space with high-energy bhakti.

✨ Why listen to this Hanuman bhajan:
• Brings energetic Ram bhakti and powerful devotional vibes
• Perfect for Tuesday/Saturday puja, satsang, and daily devotion
• Helps build courage, positivity, and inner strength
• Creates an uplifting atmosphere filled with Hanuman ji’s protection and grace

🎧 Play it loud, chant along, and feel the energy — wherever Shri Ram’s name is remembered, Hanuman ji’s devotion comes alive.
🙏 If this bhajan filled your heart with bhakti, please like, share, and subscribe to Sanatan Music for more Hanuman bhajans, Ram bhajans, and devotional songs.

snippet.title: Tu Bewafa Hai – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Tu Bewafa Hai – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Tu bewafa hai…
ye baat ab
dil ko samajh aa gayi.

Jise humne
apni duniya maana…
usi ne
hume tanha chhod diya.

Mohabbat sachchi thi meri…
par tera saath
sirf ek jhootha ehsaas nikla.

“Tu Bewafa Hai”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo pyaar mein
toot kar bhi
sirf wafa karta raha.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
bewafai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

humne dil diya tha…
tumne dard de diya…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi se
beinteha mohabbat ki ho
aur badle mein bewafai mili ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.
